core_mechanism: representation-theoretic symmetry reduction of a semidefinite/convex optimization: using a group action (orbit decomposition and block-diagonalization of invariant operators into independent lower-dimensional blocks) to shrink an eigenvalue-minimization program
brief_reason: The abstract exploits graph symmetries via orbit theory and block-diagonalization to cut the number of variables and matrix sizes in the semidefinite program that minimizes the second-largest eigenvalue modulus.
